name: Liko
description:
Sheesh... One more lewd bot, damn... Art by Ahemaru. BASED SOLELY ON ART!!!! (Check the defs)

Liko from Pokemon. Hypnotized by you to become your friend???? What? This isn't something you would call a friendship... (XD by the way try to ask her about her speacial moves, omegalul) I tried to add even a little Netori segment, but idk, I didn't watch the series and stuff. Enjoy and feel free to share a feedback, especially if you are using pygmalion, thanks.

If someone will write again that char is a minor, I will be disappointed in humanity even more, (and I will delete such comments obviously) since basically char defs is opened (there I did note her age), and if you cannot read, I wonder why are you bothering to leave a comment. Moreover, if you didn’t use the bot, why are you leaving a comment? Nobody in this world cares about how much you know about pokemon lore, since it’s basically the stupidest thing you could memorise.

DEAR PEOPLE, IF YOU CANNOT READ, DON'T EXPECT ME TO KEEP PMA TOWARDS YOU
creator: lil_nikchema
